panels.description: Number of times that all APIs in a dedicated gateway have been called.
panels.title: Requests

panels.title: 4xx Errors

panels.description: Number of times that all APIs in the dedicated gateway have been throttled.

panels.description: Average latency of all APIs in the gateway.
panels.title: Average Latency

panels.description: Maximum latency of all APIs in the gateway.
panels.title: Maximum Latency

panels.description: Number of times that an API has been called.
panels.title: Requests

panels.description: Number of times that the API returns a 2xx response.
panels.title: 2xx Responses

panels.description: Number of times that the API returns a 4xx error.

panels.description: Number of times that the API returns a 5xx error.
panels.title: 5xx Errors

panels.description: Total number of errors returned by the API.

panels.description: Load details of a gateway node on the data plane. **1** means low water level, **2** means medium water level, and **3** means high water level.
panels.title: Node System Load

panels.description: CPU usage details of a gateway node on the data plane.
panels.title: Node CPU Usage

panels.description: Memory usage details of a gateway node on the data plane.
